_meta.name: ALM 70B launch config — Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct + fresh LoRA r=32
_meta.rationale: Launcher (launch_alm_70b.hexa) reads this config via string-scan, verifies ckpt_label=production, then emits pod-side runner. Frozen defaults inside launcher mirror these values — if you change one, change both.

base.name: Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct
base.hf_license: Qwen license (commercial use, notify Alibaba for >100M MAU)
base.lineage_note: 14B A2-Tool adapter reference is metadata-only, NOT weight-transferred across param-count boundary. 70B adapter trains from scratch on 72B base.
base.resume_note: Fresh-from-base: 70B is a brand-new model class. Per feedback_no_resume_data_change, no resume of 14B adapter allowed — step 0 start.

lora.target_rationale: 7-module full coverage (attn + MLP). MLP inclusion mandatory at 72B because Qwen2.5 intermediate_size=29568 is where most capacity lives — attn-only LoRA leaves 75% weights untouched.
lora.rationale: r=32 alpha=64 matches 14B r9 canonical config (passed tool-use gate at 0.933 lenient). 14B A2-Orch used r=64 but that was rationalized by Orch-OR latent path; 70B first-round uses more conservative r=32 for 417M trainable (0.57% of 72.7B base).

training.steps_rationale: More than r11's 500 because 72B converges slower per step. Hard cap 2000 before abort.
training.total_tokens_seen_note: 800 steps × 8192 tokens = 6.55M tokens. At corpus ~4M chars (undersized) = 4-6 epochs — overfit risk unless corpus expands to 40M+ chars.
training.seq_rationale: Match 14B r7-r11 baseline. 72B supports 32K native + 128K yarn but activations scale quadratically.
training.lr_rationale: 14B→72B sqrt scaling: 5e-7 / sqrt(72.7/14) = 5e-7 / 2.28 = 2.19e-7 → round up to 3e-7 for safety. Halving fallback to 1.5e-7 if step 50 eval regresses.
training.lr_halving_plan: If eval_loss[50] > eval_loss[10], halt and relaunch at lr=1.5e-7
training.warmup_rationale: 10% of 800 total. Matches r11 recovery warmup pattern for post-regression runs.

hardware.interconnect_rationale: Multi-node 2x2 over 100GbE is 72x slower — makes 20h run become 40-60h. Single-node 4xH100 SXM mandatory.

corpus.blend: 80% Korean dialogue + 20% hire_sim + reasoning (KoAlpaca, KMMLU, KoBEST)
preprocessing: Language mix label for eval stratification

env_flags.USER_OK_4POD: 1 (required at launch; launcher refuses if unset)

early_abort_gates: step 50: eval_loss[50] > eval_loss[10] -> halve LR + relaunch
any step: peak VRAM > 78GB -> reduce batch or grad_ckpt frequency

hooks.label_routing: production -> R2 permanent upload per ckpt_policy.json

blocks.requires_all_gpus_idle: utilization <= 5% AND memory_used <= 2000 MiB on all 4

dependencies_chain: S0: ALM 14B A1 (Qwen2.5-14B + r4 LoRA) step 3000 done
S1: ALM 14B A2-Orch (A1 + Orch-OR LoRA) step 3000 done
S2: ALM 14B A2-Tool (A1+A2-Orch + tool-use LoRA) step 1500 done
S3: A2 final eval hire_sim lenient >= 0.85 (gate G1)
S5: Corpus expansion 40M+ chars OR exception file (gate G2, warning)
S6: User OK for 4-pod config (gate G4, USER_OK_4POD=1)
S9: launcher + FSDP config + preflight dry-run PASS (gate G7)
